ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the equipment is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the equipment's warranty */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the equipment's warranty */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the equipment */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_equipment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_type_id") REFERENCES equipment_types ("equipment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of equipment */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the equipment type */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment type */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the equipment type (in days or months) */,
  "maintenance_frequency" INTEGER /* Recommended frequency of maintenance (in days or months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sensor's warranty */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sensor's warranty */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended interval for sensor calibration (in days or months) */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sensor calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of sensor */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor data */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the sensor type */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor type */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the sensor type (in days or months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sensor data */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sensor data (0-1) */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data is valid */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor directly, sensor via gateway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* Parts used during the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the technician (e.g., senior technician, junior technician) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the technician */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert threshold */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor type the threshold applies to */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance level for the threshold (e.g., 5% above or below the threshold) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Default message to be included in the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment that generated the alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the alert */,
  "handled_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was handled */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Description of how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_handled_by FOREIGN KEY ("handled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintenance team, engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., maintenance, engineering, data analysis) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., equipment_id, sensor_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rul_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RUL prediction */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_rul" INTEGER /* Predicted RUL (in days) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method or model used for the prediction */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rul_predictions_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
